name: My Colony
short_description: Build, expand, and rule a growing space colony. Explore tech, trade, and multiplayer.
detailed_description:
Build. Expand. Rule the stars.

Welcome to My Colony, the ultimate sci-fi city builder and space empire simulation. Whether you’re leading a peaceful outpost or an industrial powerhouse, the galaxy is yours to shape — one rover at a time.

Build Your Colony

Start with a single lander and rover, gather resources, and unlock a massive tech tree full of structures, utilities, and special units. Every resource leads to new possibilities as you evolve from a basic outpost to a sprawling interplanetary empire.

Choose Your Civilization

Play as one of four distinct factions, each with unique tech trees, units, and play styles:

United Earth – Balanced and tech-driven

League of Independent States – Resource-efficient rebels

Zolarg Empire – Insectoid swarm-style economics

Alpha Draconians – Advanced reptilian overlords

Play Your Way

Single-city sandbox or Premium Region Mode with connected cities across a shared map

Multiplayer Regions: Cooperate or compete with friends — each sub-city run by a different player

Declare independence from your “mother colony” and start your own empire — with players paying taxes to you!

Form Federations with others to dominate galactic leaderboards

Go Galactic

Compete in daily online challenges

Trade on the Galactic Board of Trade, a real-time player-run auction house

Balance population, GDP, education, security, and more

Rise through the ranks as you scale your economy and influence

Play Anywhere

Works offline or online

Sync progress with your Ape Apps Account

Join a living universe of colonists. Forge alliances. Grow your power. Leave your mark on the stars.
